title: SusDoku: Clues & Suspects
description:
A murder has been committed. Can you solve it?

SusDoku blends the satisfying logic of sudoku with classic murder mystery deduction. A victim has been found — your job is to place suspects into rooms using clues, find the weapon used, eliminate the impossible, and name the killer before you run out of chances. 

How it worksEach case procedurally generates a grid of rooms and a group of suspects. Clues restrict where everyone can be. Place them correctly, locate the weapons, interrogate the suspects, and make your accusation. Every deduction is yours—no guessing, just pure logic. 

Two case variants• Fast — The victim shares a room with a suspect. Find the weapon used, find the room, discover the killer and the victim. Classic Sudoku logic featuring mechanics inspired by the famous Zebra Puzzle (Einstein's Riddle).

• Evidence — Several weapons are hidden across the map. Investigate the furniture and locked cells to uncover them. Only after finding all the weapons and interrogating the suspects will you be able to solve the case. 

Play your way• Single-player — Solve cases at your own pace with no time pressure (or set a timer for a real challenge).

• Local co-op (pass & play) — 2–4 detectives take turns on one device. Each detective keeps their clues private in a personal dossier, then shares deductions with the team. Placements start as color-coded proposals; a second detective must confirm each mark.

• Online co-op — Play with friends anywhere via Steam lobbies. Just share the room code and solve together. 

Features• Procedurally generated cases with selectable themes (mansion, cruise ship, brunch café, casino) and three difficulty sizes (7×7 easy, 9×9 medium, 11×11 hard). 

• Case timer with adjustable limits.

• Manual deduction mode: cross out any cell yourself.

• Full controller support: Navigate every menu and solve every case with a gamepad. 

• Furniture panel showing every object, orientation, and footprint in the current case.

• Progress history and replay by seed for your favorite cases.

• Interface in English and Spanish.

✨ Developer Note: 

We have officially changed our name to SusDoku to truly stand out and focus on what matters: delivering a purely Sudoku experience, while keeping the spirit of the investigation games we love!
description_short: A murder mystery blended with sudoku-style logic. Explore suspicious rooms, examine weapon evidence, and piece together clues through sharp deduction to reveal the killer. Play alone or work online with up to 4 detectives to solve the case together.
